```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/tasks/__init__.py",
  "3:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport logging\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, MutableMapping, Optional, Type\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom ..config import Settings, get_settings\r\nfrom ..models import Job\r\n\r\n\r\nTaskFunc = Callable[..., Awaitable[Any]]\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TaskDefinition:\r\n    name: str\r\n    payload_model: Type[BaseModel]\r\n    func: TaskFunc\r\n    max_attempts_default: int\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TaskContext:\r\n    job: Job\r\n    attempt: int\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession]\r\n    settings: Settings\r\n    logger: logging.Logger\r\n    check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]]\r\n\r\n\r\n_TASKS: MutableMapping[str, TaskDefinition] = {}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef register_task(\r\n    name: str,\r\n    *,\r\n    payload_model: Type[BaseModel],\r\n    max_attempts_default: int = 3,\r\n) -> Callable[[TaskFunc], TaskFunc]:\r\n    \"\"\"Decorator to register a task implementation.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def decorator(func: TaskFunc) -> TaskFunc:\r\n        if name in _TASKS:\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"Task {name!r} already registered\")\r\n        _TASKS[name] = TaskDefinition(\r\n            name=name,\r\n            payload_model=payload_model,\r\n            func=func,\r\n            max_attempts_default=max_attempts_default,\r\n        )\r\n        return func\r\n\r\n    return decorator\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_task_definition(name: str) -> TaskDefinition:\r\n    try:\r\n        return _TASKS[name]\r\n    except KeyError as exc:\r\n        raise KeyError(f\"Unknown task type {name!r}\") from exc\r\n\r\n\r\ndef make_context(\r\n    *,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    attempt: int,\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession],\r\n    logger: logging.Logger,\r\n    check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]],\r\n) -> TaskContext:\r\n    return TaskContext(\r\n        job=job,\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=session,\r\n        settings=get_settings(),\r\n        logger=logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, MutableMapping, Optional, Type\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom ..config import Settings, get_settings\r\nfrom ..models import Job\r\n\r\n\r\nTaskFunc = Callable[..., Awaitable[Any]]\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TaskDefinition:\r\n    name: str\r\n    payload_model: Type[BaseModel]\r\n    func: TaskFunc\r\n    max_attempts_default: int\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TaskContext:\r\n    job: Job\r\n    attempt: int\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession]\r\n    settings: Settings\r\n    logger: logging.Logger\r\n    check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]]\r\n\r\n\r\n_TASKS: MutableMapping[str, TaskDefinition] = {}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef register_task(\r\n    name: str,\r\n    *,\r\n    payload_model: Type[BaseModel],\r\n    max_attempts_default: int = 3,\r\n) -> Callable[[TaskFunc], TaskFunc]:\r\n    \"\"\"Decorator to register a task implementation.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def decorator(func: TaskFunc) -> TaskFunc:\r\n        if name in _TASKS:\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"Task {name!r} already registered\")\r\n        _TASKS[name] = TaskDefinition(\r\n            name=name,\r\n            payload_model=payload_model,\r\n            func=func,\r\n            max_attempts_default=max_attempts_default,\r\n        )\r\n        return func\r\n\r\n    return decorator\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_task_definition(name: str) -> TaskDefinition:\r\n    try:\r\n        return _TASKS[name]\r\n    except KeyError as exc:\r\n        raise KeyError(f\"Unknown task type {name!r}\") from exc\r\n\r\n\r\ndef make_context(\r\n    *,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    attempt: int,\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession],\r\n    logger: logging.Logger,\r\n    check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]],\r\n) -> TaskContext:\r\n    return TaskContext(\r\n        job=job,\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=session,\r\n        settings=get_settings(),\r\n        logger=logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
